name: opencode-openai-codex-headers
description: OpenCode plugin: make ChatGPT-OAuth (Codex backend) requests identify as the Codex CLI so gated GPT-5.6 models (luna, terra) stop returning 'Model not found' / 'server_is_overloaded', and clean up GPT-5.6 reasoning-summary rendering
author: Lars Hagen <larsh2690@hotmail.com>
